reviews.comment:
Lindo lugar, cuenta con mesas y bancos de material, ideales para descansar, tomar unos mates, comer algo y seguir viaje...

(Translated by Google)
Nice place, it has tables and benches, ideal for resting, having some mate, eating something and continuing your journey...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6487110738096342413/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURSMTRtZTNBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Los chicos muy amables y todo aseado. Sólo le faltaría REFORESTAR en los alrededores con autóctonas, así frenaría un poco la tierra que levanta el viento, eso de llama cortina de viento. El resto todo bien 👍

(Translated by Google)
The guys are very friendly and everything is neat. The only thing missing is to REFOREST the surroundings with native plants, this way it would slow down a little the land that the wind raises, what is called a wind curtain. The rest all good 👍
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6487110738096342413/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURSbGRlTnRBRRAB

reviews.comment:
hola alguien sabe si hay registro civil alli? (telefono?) o municipalidad o policia o juez de paz para consultar por el registro civil de la zona? gracias

(Translated by Google)
Hi, does anyone know if there's a civil registry office there? (Phone number?) Or a town hall, police station, or justice of the peace office where I can inquire about the civil registry in the area? Thanks
